title: Jamaican Pork Pasta
description: A flavorful and gluten-free pasta dish made with juicy pork and Jamaican spices.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the jerk seasoning and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add the pineapple and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the pasta to the skillet and stir to combine with the pork and pineapple mixture.
6. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the pasta is lightly toasted.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
